home.title: Global Digital Storefront
home.description: Unlock premium software, e-books, templates and tools from elite digital creators.
home.try_adjusting: Try adjusting your search or filters.

about.hero_desc: DIGIELERNING is a state-of-the-art software shop and marketplace built to empower creators. We provide the infrastructure for developers, designers, and educators to sell their digital products directly to a global audience.

story.title: Empowering the Digital Economy
story.p1: Founded in 2024, DIGIELERNING emerged as a solution to the complex hurdles faced by digital creators in Africa and beyond. We wanted to build a bridge between high-quality software products and the people who need them.
story.p2: Today, we function as a robust digital storefront where anyone can list software, e-books, templates, and courses. Our platform handles the secure payments, delivery, and licensing so creators can focus on what they do best: building.
story.p3: Our commitment to a creator-first economy means lower fees, faster payouts via Mobile Money, and a premium shopping experience for every customer.

team.title: The Minds Behind the Shop
team.desc: The team dedicated to building the future of digital commerce at DIGIELERNING.

affiliation.title: Sell Your Products on
affiliation.hero_desc: Join our network of expert software developers and digital creators. Reach thousands of customers in Cameroon and across the globe.

revenue.title: Revenue Sharing
revenue.desc: Earn up to 70% of every sale. Your products, your profits.

reach.title: Global Reach
reach.desc: Access a massive community of professionals and users across multiple continents.

security.title: Secure Payments
security.desc: Fast and secure payouts via Mobile Money or Bank Transfer.

form.title: Creator Application
form.desc: Tell us about your digital products and expertise.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.desc: Have a question, feedback, or want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.desc: Our support team will respond within 24 hours.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.desc: Track the status of your purchases and access your digital content.
orders.empty_desc: Explore our shop and find something you love.

footer.description: The world's premier marketplace for premium digital products. Empowering creators and users to grow together in the digital economy.
